description_long: This object is a compact electronic synthesizer or audio control panel, featuring a dense array of rotary knobs, sliders, and buttons on its top surface. The main body is rectangular with a dark, likely wooden or wood-textured frame on the sides, giving it a classic, professional appearance. The control surface is black with various colored labels and indicators, including green, orange, and white, which help distinguish different functional sections. The front panel is slightly angled for ergonomic access to the controls, and there are no visible screens, only physical controls. The device is relatively low in height and wide, designed to sit on a flat surface such as a desk or studio table. This type of equipment is commonly used in music production studios, live performance venues, or urban creative spaces.
description: A compact, rectangular electronic synthesizer or audio control panel with numerous knobs, sliders, and buttons on a black surface, framed by dark wood-textured sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full control panel with all knobs, sliders, and buttons clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angled profile and the wood-textured side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back edge and the depth of the device, with fewer visible controls.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the opposite wood-textured panel and the angled surface.
